prose:
**Aniline Fukui Reactivity Analysis** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied aniline.xyz (fixed). Fukui indices computed via finite-difference of Mulliken charges across neutral, cation radical (+1, multiplicity 2), and anion radical (−1, multiplicity 2) states. All SCF states converged; charge conservation verified (Σf⁺ = Σf⁻ = 1.0000). Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (C, ortho), f⁺ = 2.298. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (N), f⁻ = 0.205. The amino nitrogen dominates nucleophilicity while ortho-carbons (activated by resonance) are most electrophilic, consistent with known aniline chemistry.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.298
